[1] SETUP HELP TEMPLATE
---
Thanks for reaching out! 🎬 

I'm glad you're interested in learning more. Here are some great resources 
to get started:
- Check out our Getting Started guide: [link]
- Watch our setup tutorials: [link]
- Browse our FAQ: [link]

If you have specific questions after reviewing these, feel free to reach 
out again!

Best,
Concessa Obvius Team
---

[2] PRODUCT INQUIRY TEMPLATE
---
Thanks so much for your interest! 🛒

I'd love to help you find the perfect solution. To give you the best 
recommendation, could you tell me a bit more about:
- Your specific needs
- Your use case
- Any budget considerations

I'll get back to you within 24 hours with personalized options.

Best regards,
Concessa Obvius Team
---

[3] PARTNERSHIP TEMPLATE
---
Thanks for reaching out! 🤝

We're always excited about potential partnerships. Your inquiry has been 
flagged for our business development team to review.

Someone will be in touch within 2-3 business days to discuss opportunities.

Looking forward to collaborating!

Concessa Obvius Team
---

- Exclusive member content

See you there!

🔧 SYSTEM STATUS & CONFIGURATION
================================================================================
Current Mode:     STANDALONE DEMO (monitoring queue, ready for live API)
Data Source:      /tmp/new-dms.json, youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl, environment
Deduplication:    ✅ Enabled (prevents duplicate processing)
Auto-Responses:   ✅ Enabled (all categories)
Partnership Flag: ✅ Enabled (scores >60)

⚠️  To Enable Live YouTube DM Ingestion (choose one):

1. EMAIL FORWARDING (Recommended)
   Setup Time: 15 minutes
   Method: Forward YouTube DMs to email → parse automatically
   Status: youtube-dm-email-parser.py ready

2. WEBHOOK RECEIVER (Real-time)
   Setup Time: 20 minutes
   Method: External service → webhook POST to receiver
   Status: youtube-dm-webhook.py ready

3. MANUAL QUEUE (Immediate Testing)
   Setup Time: 2 minutes
   Method: Drop JSON files to .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl
   Status: Ready (for testing/demo)

4. YOUTUBE API OAUTH (Full Automation)
   Setup Time: 30 minutes
   Method: Direct YouTube API integration
   Status: youtube-api-auth.py ready
